nasb.text: “You shall also make a plate of pure gold and shall engrave on it, like the engravings of a seal, ‘Holy to the Lord.’

esv.text: “You shall make a plate of pure gold and engrave on it, like the engraving of a signet, ‘Holy to the Lord.’

cnv.text: “你要用精金做一面牌子，在牌上像刻印章般刻著：‘歸耶和華為聖’。

ccb.text: “你也要用纯金造一块牌子，以刻印章的方法刻上‘奉献给耶和华’的字样，
